scripts.start:all: concurrently --names "USER,CATALOG,CART,ORDER,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,red,magenta" "npm run start:dev --workspace=@app/user-service" "npm run start:dev --workspace=@app/catalog-service" "npm run start:dev --workspace=@app/cart-service" "npm run start:dev --workspace=@app/order-service" "npm run dev --workspace=@app/admin"
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e --workspace=@app/user-service && npm run test:e2e --workspace=@app/catalog-service && npm run test:e2e --workspace=@app/cart-service && npm run test:e2e --workspace=@app/order-service
scripts.test:unit:all: npm run test:unit --workspace=@app/user-service && npm run test:unit --workspace=@app/catalog-service && npm run test:unit --workspace=@app/cart-service && npm run test:unit --workspace=@app/order-service
